programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.sub_title: Feeling the Squeeze in Seoul, South Korea
programs.desc: A college graduate wants to move from Las Vegas to Seoul, South Korea to be with her long-distance boyfriend; the high cost of small apartments in Seoul and her limited budget might make it difficult.

programs.title: Interior Design Masters
programs.desc: The designers are tasked with transforming five luxury apartments in London's Elephant and Castle; working in pairs, each team must transform an apartment together.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.sub_title: Ready vs. Reluctant in Espiritu Santo, Vanuatu
programs.desc: He plans to use the archipelago as a backdrop for his nature videos, but the lack of western amenities has her rethinking the move entirely.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.sub_title: Family Seeks Multigenerational Home in Costa Rica
programs.desc: A father-daughter team searches for a million-dollar multigenerational home on the jungle coast of Brasilito, Costa Rica; they have an extensive wish list in which an ocean view, a pool and separate guest quarters are all required.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.sub_title: Singing in the City, in Stockholm
programs.desc: After a health scare, a husband and wife look to fulfill their dream of living abroad in Stockholm, Sweden; he seeks the vibrancy of the city center, but space is hard to come by in town and she needs enough room to teach opera lessons from home.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.sub_title: NYC Woman Seeks Love in Amsterdam
programs.desc: An NYC woman leaves everything for one last shot at finding love and starting a family in Amsterdam; she searches for her dream man as well as the dream apartment, but with Amsterdam's housing crunch, those dreams may be in jeopardy.
